notes: Short glue file (89 lines, 4 decls) establishing `W.toAffine.Point ≃ ProjectiveSmoothPoint` and deriving a `Fintype` instance and cardinality identity. All four declarations are near-duplicates of material already in `PicZero.lean` (under different namespaces); the rest of the codebase (`DivisorTranslate.lean`, `PairingNondeg.lean`) references the `PicZero.lean` versions, not these. The `Frobenius` import appears unused.
